zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Corbet於1372年3月2日出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特時，他的父親Thomas Corbet32歲，母親Beatrice de Leigh29歲。他於1401年與Jane Burley在英國斯塔福爾易亞斯特 斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1442年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Corbet was born on 2 March 1372, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Corbet, was 32 and his mother, Beatrice de Leigh, was 29. He married Jane Burley in 1401, in East Staffordshire, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1442, in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

Il a épousé Jane Burley en 1401, à East Staffordshire, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Corbetが1372年3月2日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットで生まれた時，父Thomas Corbetは32歳，母Beatrice de Leighは29歳であった。1401年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアエアスト スタフォードシュアイアでJane Burleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1442年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ボスウオルスで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Corbet(이)가 1372년 3월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Corbet(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice de Leigh(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1401년 영국 스태퍼드실르 이스트 스태퍼드실르에서 Jane Burley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1442년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 마크트 보스워스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.
